title: avenochloa hookeri subsp. schelliana
intro: Avenochloa hookeri subsp. schelliana, also known as Wild Oats, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Avenochloa hookeri subsp. schelliana include its ability to aid in digestion and reduce stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for gastrointestinal issues and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or decoction, and its extracts are also used in supplements and teas.
